title: Hayalet Dayi
overview: Ozan and Caner, searching for a place to call home, finally find the perfect house after a long and arduous search. The house they find at an extraordinary price turns out to be truly extraordinary, and amusing events follow them everywhere. Unfortunately, the deceased owner of the old mansion they rented is stuck in limbo, and only Caner and Ozan can see him. Helping this old soul cross over peacefully is now the task of these two young men. The mission they embark on to find peace in the house drags them into a series of events that are as comical as they are emotional.
